form.formComment: Impressive performance showing plenty of speed to score by 4 lengths in a Grade 4/5 last start at this track, clocking an outstanding 22.10 for the 390m trip. Can measure up again if runs up to that effort.

form.formComment: Finished third at big odds last time (22.24) over 390m at Warrnambool. Has a low draw. Has ability and should run well.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Finished third at big odds last time (22.24) over 390m at Warrnambool. Has a low draw. Has ability and should run well.

form.formComment: Won two starts back after racing on the pace at Geelong over 400m in 22.78. Couldn't repeat the feat last time out when fourth over 400m at Geelong at Mix 3/4 level. Looks up against it this time.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Won two starts back after racing on the pace at Geelong over 400m in 22.78. Couldn't repeat the feat last time out when fourth over 400m at Geelong at Mix 3/4 level. Looks up against it this time.

form.formComment: Missed the frame last start when a 10 length sixth (22.63) at this track. Previous form sound including a win three back at this track. Could pose a serious challenge if finds best this time.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Missed the frame last start when a 10 length sixth (22.63) at this track. Previous form sound including a win three back at this track. Could pose a serious challenge if finds best this time.

form.formComment: Good performance to win by half a length at this track over 390m (22.15) beating Bull Durham in Grade 5 on April 1. Can't make much of a case this time.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Good performance to win by half a length at this track over 390m (22.15) beating Bull Durham in Grade 5 on April 1. Can't make much of a case this time.

form.formComment: Was out of placings last time (25.56) at this track in a Grade 4/5, finishing eighth and beaten 7 lengths. Has performed well off the draw with a win and four places from seven starts. Makes appeal on best.

form.formComment: Last start finished 3rd over 400m at Geelong beaten 5.5 lengths (23.01) behind Come And See in a Free For All on March 27. Has been around the mark at her last couple and should make her presence felt.

form.formComment: Lifted to win two runs back and scored again last start over 400m at Geelong (22.42,) beating Doongalla Al. In top form and can make it three straight.
